title: Contingent vs Robust AI Power Demand (interactive)
description: An interactive, explorable front-end to Contingent vs Robust AI Power Demand: a realized announced-to-in-service completion anchor from the PJM interconnection queue, where most announced generation projects leave the funnel. A deflation calculator deflates any announced capacity through three measured attrition stages (de-duplication, viability survival to a signed interconnection agreement, and build rate), with defaults set to the PJM mature-cohort base rate (about one announced MW in five built); a second view shows the published completion funnel and realized completion by cohort. No raw PJM data is bundled (it carries a redistribution restriction); only the published derived aggregates. Supply-side deflation, not the demand headline. Companion to the paper at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20559430. CC BY 4.0.
